batch_objective: Restyle the s19_app Textual TUI to Direction B (Rail + Command). View-layer only: no data-processing changes, no new runtime dependencies. Deferred: CRC engine, patch undo/redo, bookmark persistence, PDF export.
batch_layout: Each batch is archived under .dev-flow/<YYYY-MM-DD>-batch-NN/. Living project documentation (REQUIREMENTS.md, tests/, docs/diagrams/) is maintained outside the batch archive and kept current every batch.

living_documentation.requirements: REQUIREMENTS.md (repo root) - R-* traceability updated as behavior lands
living_documentation.tests: tests/ - suite kept green and extended each batch

decisions_log.notes: batch-02 opened on branch dev-flow/batch-02-direction-b-restyle. .dev-flow/ restructured to date-organized layout. Scope = Direction B restyle of existing s19_app/tui/, view-layer only.
Phase 1 (4 iterations): 14 US / 15 HLR / 38 LLR / 38 active TC. 13 OQs resolved, all 24 Phase-2 findings folded in.
Phase 2 (2 iterations): 24 findings raised and all closed; closure verdict pass (0 blockers, 0 majors). 5 minor/cosmetic CV items to fold into Phase 3 increment 1. User approved -> Phase 3.
